decision-tree.root-question: Do the Applies-If preconditions ALL hold for this task?

branch.question: Is the primary trigger (first Applies-If item) present in the input artefact?
Is the secondary constraint (second Applies-If item) also met?

branch.conclusion: Apply the full methodology starting from r1-strict-true; load content/01-core-rules.xml and follow content/04-procedure.xml (if present).
Partial application: apply r2-four-extras only; do not enforce later-stage rules.
Pre-conditions not met; revisit Applies-If list before applying any rule. Pause and clarify.
Skip this methodology; route to the sibling methodology indicated by the Skip-If reason.

example.p: Typical happy path: applies-if holds, primary trigger present, secondary met → run the full methodology against r1-strict-true.
